meaning: n.[妞峕鍒烘煆灞炰笡鏈ㄦ垨鏍戞湪
examples: If I die, bury me under the juniper-tree.
In front of the house there was a court, in which grew a juniper-tree.
Her husband buried her under the juniper-tree, and wept bitterly for her.
Crosspoint, the three-year champ, benefited from routermaker Juniper Networks and e-commerce software provider Ariba.
They include Apple, Baidu (the Google of China) EMC, Oracle, Juniper, Amazon and QualComm.
